g.text: Data Generation Pipeline (Mainly For CNN Training)

text.tspan: 3 EnsembleModel instances with initialized states of shape:
and append assimilated states to history
Note: Since Data is used for training a CNN
with Goal of EnKF + CNN mimicing QPEns behavior,
it is fair to set the EnKF state to the current
QPEns State before the next propagation.
Add base noise to Truth state
- Observe all vars if rain > threshold
Save All 3 EnKF, QPEns and Truth state histories
